title: medicago minima subsp. brevispina
intro: Medicago minima subsp. brevispina, also known as small bird's foot trefoil, is a subspecies of the Medicago minima plant, a small perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Medicago minima subsp. brevispina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Medicago minima subsp. brevispina can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil for topical use, or used as a tincture to promote overall well-being.
